PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jun-06-2006 Continued To Jul-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Catherine Stark appearing for Wells Fargo Bank. Jay Jacobus appearing for Beverly Baggarley, petitioner. Mr. Jacobus had a hard time reaching his client to sign the agreement. He was informed that the signed agreement is in the mail. Both counsel agree to have the petition dropped without prejudice by 7/1 if the agreement is not signed. Matter is continued to 7/11. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar May-09-2006 Continued To Jun-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jay Jacobus appearing for petitioner. Catherine Stark appearing for Well Fargo Bank, trustee. Matter is settled. Counsel will need time to work on the settlement agreement. Matter is continued to 6/6. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
